excerpt: The mountain's daughter, and the wedding of the world…

sections.label: Pallavi
sections.ta:
மலைமகள் கல்யாணம் காண
உலகமே கூடி நின்றதே
sections.translit:
malaimagaL kalyANam kANa
ulagamE kUdi nindradhE
sections.en:
To witness the wedding of the mountain's daughter,
the whole world gathered together.

sections.label: Anupallavi
sections.ta:
சிவனுடன் இணைந்த சக்தியே
குடும்பத்தின் காவல் தெய்வமே
sections.translit:
sivanudan iNaindha sakthiyE
kudumbathin kAval dheivamE
sections.en:
O power united with Shiva,
guardian deity of the family.

notes: Parvathi (literally 'daughter of the mountain') is the divine consort of Shiva. Her wedding is celebrated in many temple traditions.
